prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar AJ-V8 5.0L supercharged (AJ133) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a custom ECU tune by Dynochip UK for 650hp at 7,000 RPM on 98 RON fuel

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (front and rear), Uprated half-shafts by GKN Driveline, and a P38 Range Rover transfer case with a 2.93:1 low-range gear ratio for rock-crawling capability

Suspension overhaul with Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers (remote reservoirs, 14-position compression damping), Polyurethane bushings by SuperPro, and a custom 3-link rear setup with Panhard rod for articulation
estetica: Full custom overland body kit by Arctic Trucks, including widened fender flares (3mm aluminum, powder-coated in Satin Black), a modular roof rack system by Front Runner Outfitters with a 270-degree awning, and a custom front bumper with Warn Zeon 12-S winch and Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods

Interior rework with a full Alcantara headliner, Recaro SRD front seats (heated, with 4-point harnesses by Schroth), and a custom center console housing a RaceLogic VBOX Sport data logger and a Garmin Overlander GPS system

Exterior accents: Carbon fiber hood (by EGR) with functional heat extractors, a custom rear swing-out tire carrier with a 37-inch BF Goodrich KM3 spare, and a set of Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +12mm offset) in Satin Black with beadlock rings
